lists.1: Nsx_emot_n_chk_fail: Rotor speed is based on backup position acquisition, increased noise.
lists.2: Nsx_emot_n_full_fail: No reliable position inforamtion to compute rotor speed or incoherency between functional and safety rotation speeds

lists.1: Nsx_dgt_emot_psn_chk_fail: Failure of the functional position acquisition
lists.2: Nsx_dgt_emot_psn_chk_fail_sfty: Failure of the safety position acquisition
lists.3: Nsx_dgt_emot_psn_chk_full_fail: Double failure or incoherency between functional and safety positions
"Unexpected braking" is detected by the "static control strategy"
lists.4: "Unexpected acceleration" in case of negative torque request is detected by the "static control strategy"
lists.5: "Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "static control strategy"
lists.6: "Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"
lists.7: "Over braking" is detected by the "static control strategy"
lists.8: "Over braking" or "Unexpected braking" are detected by the "dynamic control strategy"
lists.9: "Lack of motricity" is detected by the "static control strategy"
lists.10: "Lack of motricity" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"
lists.11: "Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "static control strategy"
lists.12: "Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"
lists.13: Non zero generated torque detected in case of overvoltage
lists.14: Non limited torque detected in case of rotor overtemperature (rotor temperature = 100%)

List of Electrical Vehicle ECUs with Aft.comment: List of Electrical Vehicle ECUs with After-sales diagnostic

lists.0: ECM virgin - Secret key not learnt
lists.2: Not virgin ECM - Secret key learnt in erasable area
lists.3: Not virgin ECM - Secret key learnt in non erasable area

lists.0: Nsx_hv_nok (0): More than one sensor failure
lists.3: Nsx_hv_dcdc_dfl (3): HV DCDC voltage sensor Failure
lists.4: Nsx_hv_bat_dfl (4):  HV Battery voltage sensor Failure
lists.5: Nsx_hv_nw_loss : HV Network Loss or false relay status information
lists.8: Nsx_hv_rly_open_dfl: false open relay status information

lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

lists.1: both currents are out of range  OR the 2 currents are inconsistent (difference > thershold)
lists.2: current from sensor 1 (Vxx_i_f_1) is out of range
lists.3: current from sensor 2 (Vxx_i_f_2) is out of range

lists.0: the summ of the 3 currents is close to zero (< threshold)
lists.1: the summ of the 3 currents isn't close to zero (>threshold)  OR at least 2 of the currents are out of range

lists.3: current from sensor 2 (Vxx_i_mot_ph_2) is out of range
